description: Tiny gold set for evaluating DIAL structured extraction on synthetic turbofan PHM snippets (task-relevant maintenance notes).

samples.text: FD001 run log: engine 7 exceeded nominal fan speed after operational cycle 145. Fault mode noted as HPC degradation.
Inspection report FD003 — Unit 12, last recorded cycle 98, combined HPC and fan degradation suspected.
Test trajectory FD002 engine_id=4 ended at cycle 200 before failure; six operating conditions; HPC degradation fault mode per scenario FD002.
Prognostics note: for FD004 fleet member 22, monitor sensor drift from cycle 50 onward; multi-condition ops with HPC and fan degradation modes.
